name: Platypus II
short_description: Fly the famed Platypus fighter through a fantastic landscape of carefully molded clay to protect inhabitants of Mungola from the Collosatropolians! Collect power-ups and bonus stars to give your Platypus the boost you need. Every level of this gorgeous arcade challenge bursts with original fun that's perfect for gamers of all ages.
detailed_description:
Exclusive News!

Platypus Reclayed is out NOW!

23 years later, original creator Anthony Flack alongside the Claymatic Team has brought back Platypus - Reprogrammed from scratch and updated for modern hardware..

Platypus Reclayed is moulded from the ground up with all-new models and artwork photographed in 4K, featuring updated gameplay, new weapons and additional content.

It's available now on PC, Mac and Consoles.


About the Game

Fly the famed Platypus fighter through a fantastic landscape of carefully molded clay to protect inhabitants of Mungola from the Collosatropolians! Collect power-ups and bonus stars to give your Platypus the boost you need. Every level of this gorgeous arcade challenge bursts with original fun that's perfect for gamers of all ages.

Features:

  • Cooperative Multi-Player (1-3 Players Locally)
  • Two Difficulty Levels
  • Stunning Claymation Graphics
  • Unique and Addictive Fun
